Bluetooth firmware source files for advertising, connection management, analytics, GATT operations, and pairing.


## Files
- **[adv_reconnect.c](adv_reconnect.c.md)**: Defines Bluetooth advertising job terms for reconnection attempts.
- **[advert.c](advert.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth advertising and connection events for the Pebble firmware.
- **[analytics.c](analytics.c.md)**: Functions for Bluetooth analytics, including connection quality and BLE parameter collection.
- **[bt_classic_stubs.c](bt_classic_stubs.c.md)**: Stub functions for Bluetooth Classic operations in the Pebble firmware.
- **[bt_test.c](bt_test.c.md)**: Bluetooth driver test functions for starting, stopping, and handling HCI passthrough and RF test modes.
- **[comm.c](comm.c.md)**: Implements Bluetooth communication scheduling and task management functions.
- **[gap_le_connect.c](gap_le_connect.c.md)**: Function to disconnect a Bluetooth Low Energy connection using a device's internal address.
- **[gap_le_device_name.c](gap_le_device_name.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth GAP LE device name requests and manages device name retrieval for connections.
- **[gap_le_scan.c](gap_le_scan.c.md)**: Functions to start and stop Bluetooth Low Energy (LE) scanning.
- **[gatt.c](gatt.c.md)**: Functions for responding to GATT read subscriptions and sending changed indications in Bluetooth.
- **[gatt_client_discovery.c](gatt_client_discovery.c.md)**: Implements GATT client service discovery for Bluetooth connections, including service, characteristic, and descriptor management.
- **[gatt_client_operations.c](gatt_client_operations.c.md)**: Implements GATT client operations for reading and writing attributes in a Bluetooth connection.
- **[hrm_service.c](hrm_service.c.md)**: Implements Bluetooth Heart Rate Monitor service functions for measurement handling and support checking.
- **[id.c](id.c.md)**: Functions for managing Bluetooth device identity, including setting names and copying addresses.
- **[init.c](init.c.md)**: Initializes and manages the Bluetooth driver and NimBLE host tasks for the Pebble firmware.
- **[logging.c](logging.c.md)**: Functions to set and get the logging level for a Bluetooth firmware endpoint.
- **[nimble_store.c](nimble_store.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth security data storage and operations for secure connections and bonding.
- **[nimble_store.h](nimble_store.h.md)**: Initializes the Nimble store in the Bluetooth firmware.
- **[nimble_type_conversions.c](nimble_type_conversions.c.md)**: Functions for converting between NimBLE and Pebble Bluetooth data types.
- **[nimble_type_conversions.h](nimble_type_conversions.h.md)**: Functions for converting between NimBLE and Pebble Bluetooth data types and structures.
- **[pairability.c](pairability.c.md)**: Sets the enabled state for Bluetooth Low Energy pairability.
- **[pairing_confirm.c](pairing_confirm.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth pairing confirmation by injecting user confirmation input into the BLE stack.
- **[pebble_pairing_service.c](pebble_pairing_service.c.md)**: Implements Bluetooth pairing service for Pebble devices, handling connectivity and security operations.
- **[responsiveness.c](responsiveness.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth LE connection parameter updates using NimBLE in the Pebble firmware.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build configuration script for Bluetooth firmware, setting defines and compiling driver sources.
